meta.title: Hilka Aps — Small, considered iOS apps.
meta.description: Hilka Aps — small, considered iOS apps.

home.sub: Hilka Aps builds focused, beautifully simple iOS apps that do one thing well — no clutter, no noise.

focusly.name: Focusly
focusly.desc: A calm focus timer that turns scattered hours into deep, distraction-free work. Set a session, mute the noise, and watch your streak grow — Focusly keeps you in flow without the guilt-trip gamification. Just you, the work, and a quiet timer.

teaser.name: The next one is taking shape.
teaser.desc: We build slowly and deliberately — one focused app at a time. Something new is on the workbench. Be the first to know when it lands.

cta.sub: Try the app that keeps you in flow.

meta.title: Focusly — Focus that finally sticks. · Hilka Aps
meta.description: Focusly — a calm focus timer that turns scattered hours into deep, distraction-free work.

hero.sub: Set a session, silence the noise, and watch your deep-work streak grow. Focusly keeps you in flow — no clutter, no guilt.

steps.label: Step 01
steps.title: Set
steps.desc: Pick a focus length and what you're working on. One tap to begin.

steps.label: Step 02
steps.title: Flow
steps.desc: Distractions go quiet. A gentle timer keeps you anchored in the task.

steps.label: Step 03
steps.title: Review
steps.desc: See your streaks, focused hours, and best times of day at a glance.

stat.label: focused hours logged by early users

items.title: Smart Timer
items.desc: Pomodoro, custom, or open-ended sessions that adapt to you.

items.title: Focus Sounds
items.desc: Curated ambient soundscapes to settle your mind.

items.title: Streaks & Stats
items.desc: Track daily streaks and weekly deep-work totals.

items.title: Distraction Shield
items.desc: Mutes notifications automatically while you focus.

items.title: Session Tags
items.desc: Label sessions by project and see where your time goes.

items.title: iCloud Sync
items.desc: Your history follows you across iPhone and iPad.

items.title: The science of deep work
items.excerpt: Why uninterrupted focus beats multitasking every time.

items.title: Build a focus habit
items.excerpt: A simple routine to make daily deep work automatic.

items.title: Beat distraction
items.excerpt: Practical ways to protect your attention in a noisy world.

items.a: Focusly is free to download with an optional Pro upgrade for advanced stats and sounds.
Yes. Focusly runs fully offline; iCloud sync kicks in when you're back online.
Absolutely — from 1 minute to several hours, or open-ended.
Yes, via iCloud across iPhone and iPad.

items.quote: Focusly is the first timer I've actually stuck with.

items.quote: It's quiet, pretty, and gets out of my way. Perfect.

meta.title: About · Hilka Aps
meta.description: Hilka Aps is a tiny studio making focused iOS apps for everyday life.

about.lead: Hilka Aps is a tiny studio making focused iOS apps for everyday life.
about.story: We believe the best software does less, better. Every Hilka app starts with one clear job and a calm, uncluttered interface — then we sweat the details until it feels effortless. No dark patterns, no noise, no upsell maze. Just small, honest tools we'd want to use ourselves.

items.title: Simple
items.desc: One job. Done well. No feature creep.

items.title: Private by default
items.desc: Your data stays on your device.

items.title: Made with care
items.desc: Every detail sweated until it feels effortless.
